name: Tamale Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions and garlic in hot fat until tender but not brown. Add sausage, crumble, and brown. Drain off drippings. Add tomato sauce, corn, olives, and salt. Mix well.
2. Pour meat mixture into a two-quart casserole dish. Pour corn bread topping over the meat mixture.
3. Bake at 400°F for 35 minutes or until the top is brown.
